dna.notes: Defined-risk bull put vertical: sell OTM put + buy further OTM put. max_loss_usd=(width-credit)*100; BP≈max_loss. Fits $3k open-risk when width small.
Long symmetric call butterfly: buy lower call, sell two middle calls, buy upper call. Debit is defined 1-lot max loss; research-only BS same-expiry scaffold.

dna.notes: Defined-risk short iron condor: OTM put credit wing + OTM call credit wing. Collect both sides; max_loss≈max(wing_width)-total_credit. Neutral/high-IV range structure.
